title: Player Emotes
description: Allows the players to express themselves in more ways than previously possible
body:
Ever wanted the ability to confidently express yourself in multiple ways in Minecraft? Player Emotes introduces a collection of animations the player could play, and others would see, to make any situation more interesting and/or more immersive.

# Features - Play sequenced emotes (Like a backflip) - Play **looped emotes** _(Strike a pose and maintain it, like a salute or a dance)_ - Multiple **variations** for the same emote _(Single emote has different possible animations)_ - **Conditional** animations _(an emote may play specific animations depending on player conditions)_ - Emotes **viewable by other players** - Emotes combatiable with animation resourcepack that depend on **EMF** like **Fresh Animations** - Easily accessible radial wheel to play animations from, configurable **in-game**. - Adds animations from other mods like **Sitting+**, if loaded. # Images

# F.A.Q 1. **Why two libraries?** They are both currently essential for the mod to work, however in the future I may lessen the requirements to one library instead of two. 2. **Can you make x feature?** I'm still new to modding, this is practically my first mod, so even if I seem positive about an idea please be patient with me. 3. **Can you suppose x version?** Short answer, no. Long answer is I may in the future if enough people request it. Maintaining multiple versions is more exhausting than you may think.
